title: verbascum fontqueri
intro: Verbascum fontqueri, also known as Font Quer's mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein family, native to Spain and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Verbascum fontqueri include its ability to soothe sore throats, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Verbascum fontqueri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
